title: Duck & Bacon Jalapeño
description: The one that started it all. Smoked duck, applewood bacon, and jalapeño heat, served on a brioche roll. The sausage that turned an argument into a menu.

title: Bavarian Bratwurst
description: Classic for a reason. Pork, beef, onion, and spice, done the traditional way — no gimmicks, just the real thing done right.

title: Rattlesnake & Jalapeño
description: More legend than gimmick — mostly rabbit and rattlesnake, all jalapeño heat. Order it once out of curiosity. Order it again because it's actually great.
